description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a flat roof, typical of contemporary urban architecture. The main structure is connected to a detached secondary unit via a narrow walkway, suggesting a possible garage or auxiliary space. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. Wooden fencing encloses a spacious front deck and a smaller side patio, both adorned with planters and greenery. The building sits elevated on short stilts, enhancing its modern aesthetic and possibly providing ventilation or flood protection. The overall layout is compact yet functional, ideal for urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white walls, large windows, and wooden fenced decks, connected to a detached auxiliary unit by a walkway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main bungalow, the connecting walkway, and the detached auxiliary unit; wooden fencing and deck are visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, large windows, and the spacious wooden deck with planters.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the side patio, grouped windows, and the connection to the auxiliary unit.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the auxiliary unit, the connecting walkway, and the back of the main bungalow with minimal window openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
